allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial implementation of The Tightening - Adaptive Piano Learning App

Completed Features:
- Central configuration system with all tunable parameters
- Adaptive key mapping algorithm (Gaussian distribution)
- Audio engine with three feedback mechanisms (detuning, timbre, volume)
- Reference melody player with auto-fade
- Progress tracker with auto/manual modes
- Guitar Hero falling notes visualization
- Visual piano keyboard with distribution glow
- Practice controls UI
- MIDI file parser and song loader
- Canon in D (Pachelbel) - public domain MIDI
- The Tightening logo and branding

Core Innovation:
Revolutionary approach to piano learning where ANY key plays the melody initially,
with a probability distribution that gradually tightens around correct keys over
2-3 hours of practice. Audio quality (detuning, timbre, volume) degrades for wrong
keys, providing gentle guidance without frustration.

Tech Stack:
- Electron + React 18 + TypeScript + Vite
- Tone.js for audio synthesis
- WebMidi v3 for MIDI input
- Canvas + SVG for visualizations

Status:
UI rendering successfully. Audio system has Tone.js timing errors that need debugging.
Ready for end-to-end testing with MIDI keyboard.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
